allow: Bash(python -c "import uvicorn; from app.main import app; print\('Import OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Bots returned: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  - {b[\\"id\\"]} | {b[\\"name\\"]} | status={b[\\"status\\"]}'\) for b in d[:5]]")

Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:8099/api/bots/chat/stream -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"What are your opening hours?","bot_id":"spice-garden-ai","session_id":"test-123","history":[]}' --max-time 15)

Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:8099/api/bots/chat/stream -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"What are your opening hours?","bot_id":"spice-garden-ai","session_id":"test-123","history":[]}' --max-time 20)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8099/api/bots/chat/stream -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"I want to book a table for 4 on Saturday at 7pm, my name is Raj and phone is 9876543210","bot_id":"spice-garden-ai","session_id":"lead-test-001","history":[]}' --max-time 25)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('start:', p['scripts'].get\('start'\)\); print\('build:', p['scripts'].get\('build'\)\)")
